channel.title: SHOTAVIX Camera Blog
channel.description: In-depth camera reviews, honest buying advice, and photography inspiration — made for enthusiasts, by enthusiasts.

item.title: Canon EOS R5 Mark II Review 2026: The Best Canon Camera Ever Made?
item.dc:creator: Oli Sa
item.description: Canon EOS R5 Mark II review 2026: 45MP stacked sensor, 8K 60p RAW, Eye Control AF, 30fps burst, and 8.5-stop IBIS. Full hands-on test and verdict.
item.content:encoded: Canon EOS R5 Mark II review 2026: 45MP stacked sensor, 8K 60p RAW, Eye Control AF, 30fps burst, and 8.5-stop IBIS. Full hands-on test and verdict.

item.title: Canon EOS R6 Mark II Review 2026: Is This the Perfect Hybrid Camera?
item.dc:creator: Oli Sa
item.description: Canon EOS R6 Mark II review 2026: 24.2MP sensor, 40fps burst, 6K oversampled 4K 60p video, and class-leading AF. Still the perfect hybrid in 2026?
item.content:encoded: Canon EOS R6 Mark II review 2026: 24.2MP sensor, 40fps burst, 6K oversampled 4K 60p video, and class-leading AF. Still the perfect hybrid in 2026?

item.title: Sony RX100 VII Review 2026: Is This Compact Camera Still King?
item.dc:creator: Oli Sa
item.description: Sony RX100 VII review 2026: 24-200mm Zeiss zoom, 20fps burst, real-time Eye AF, 4K video, and 1-inch sensor. Is this 2019 compact still worth buying?
item.content:encoded: Sony RX100 VII review 2026: 24-200mm Zeiss zoom, 20fps burst, real-time Eye AF, 4K video, and 1-inch sensor. Is this 2019 compact still worth buying?

item.description: Sony FX30 review 2026: 26MP APS-C sensor, 4K 120p 10-bit video, dual native ISO, Cine EI, and active cooling. Is this the ultimate cinema camera for creators?
item.content:encoded: Sony FX30 review 2026: 26MP APS-C sensor, 4K 120p 10-bit video, dual native ISO, Cine EI, and active cooling. Is this the ultimate cinema camera for creators?

item.dc:creator: Oli Sa

item.dc:creator: Oli Sa

item.description: Learn essential photography terms: aperture, ISO, shutter speed, bokeh, depth of field, RAW vs JPEG, and 50+ must-know words for beginner photographers.
item.content:encoded: Learn essential photography terms: aperture, ISO, shutter speed, bokeh, depth of field, RAW vs JPEG, and 50+ must-know words for beginner photographers.

item.title: Photography Basics: Understanding Exposure Triangle
item.dc:creator: Oli Sa
item.description: Master the exposure triangle: aperture, shutter speed, and ISO explained simply. Learn how they work together to create perfectly exposed photos every time.
item.content:encoded: Master the exposure triangle: aperture, shutter speed, and ISO explained simply. Learn how they work together to create perfectly exposed photos every time.

item.title: Camera Settings Cheat Sheet for Perfect Photos
item.dc:creator: Oli Sa
item.description: Your complete camera settings cheat sheet: master the exposure triangle, white balance, focus modes, metering, and genre-specific settings for perfect photos.
item.content:encoded: Your complete camera settings cheat sheet: master the exposure triangle, white balance, focus modes, metering, and genre-specific settings for perfect photos.
